title: No Seeds Spam
description: Wheat seeds only drop when breaking grass with a hoe---Better for inventory clutter and clearing large plains!
body:
Wheat seeds only drop when breaking grass with a hoe.
Applies to short grass, tall grass, ferns, and large ferns, which all drop seeds.
## Why you should want this:
* Less inventory clutter, easier to clear large areas
* Less lag from item entities
* Adds a player choice (engaging)
* Good game design


Inspired by the Raspberry Flavored modpack. Check it out [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured)
